productDisplayName: Nike Women Dunk Purple Violet Shoe
description: The nike Dunk High shoes give superior performance and comfort. The high heel counter is super cool while the outsole gives excellent traction. Team these with jeans and tees for a cool casual look.Upper Perforated toe uppers for added breathability High profile design provides ankle support High heel counter for added protection of the ankle Midsole Full length EVA midsole for added cushioning Outsole Flexible multi-directional rubber outsole with a full cupsole stitch for durability Wash care1. Wipe surface with soft, clean, damp cloth to remove dust2. Do not machine wash
